_meta.description: Seed catalog: Rocksmith gear type → recommended VST3/AU plugins. Free plugins only. Used by /vst/suggest endpoint and the per-piece VST panel hint.
_meta.notes: v5: add MeldaProduction Free as a second core install — drops Bertom (MTremolo+MVibrato replace it) and upgrades multi-band EQ from 3 → 6 bands (MEqualizer beats kHs 3-Band for the EQ5/EQ8/StudioEQ family). Melda free covers tremolo/vibrato/flanger/phaser/ring-mod/EQ/comp as PRIMARY. KHS stays primary for chorus/limiter/gate/multi-band-comp/wah-filter (Melda's free bundle has no equivalent — its *MB, Turbo*, Vintage* etc. are paid demo and mute periodically). Marvel GEQ is an OPTIONAL third install for users who want true 16-band EQ on EQ5/EQ8.

__free_vst_install_guide._note: Two free installs cover the whole library. Optional third for max EQ fidelity.

essential.name: Kilohearts Essentials
essential.covers: Chorus, Delay, Reverb, Filter/Wah, Limiter, Gate, 3-Band EQ (fallback), Distortion/Drive, Bitcrusher, Pitch Shifter (octavers), Ring Mod (fallback)
essential.install_notes: Each module ships as an individual VST3 (kHs Chorus.vst3, kHs Delay.vst3, etc.) in /Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3 on macOS. After install, Settings → Scan plugins.

essential.name: MeldaProduction Free (MFreeFXBundle)
essential.covers: Tremolo (MTremolo), Vibrato (MVibrato), Flanger (MFlanger), Phaser (MPhaser), Ring Mod (MRingModulator), 6-band EQ (MEqualizer), Compressor (MCompressor)
essential.install_notes: Install the FREE-ONLY bundle, not MCompleteBundle. Premium plugins (anything with *MB / Turbo* / Vintage* / MGuitarArchitect / MLimiterX etc.) run in demo mode with PERIODIC AUDIO MUTING — unusable for song playback. The catalog only ever points to verified-free plugins.

optional_for_eq_fidelity.name: Voxengo Marvel GEQ
optional_for_eq_fidelity.covers: Pedal_EQ5 + Pedal_EQ8 + Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8 — 16-band linear-phase graphic EQ. Lossless mapping vs MEqualizer's 6-band (which loses 2 of 8 for EQ8).
optional_for_eq_fidelity.install_notes: Free, no registration. VST3 + AU on macOS/Windows.

optional_for_eq_fidelity.name: TDR Nova
optional_for_eq_fidelity.covers: Rack_StudioEQ (4-band parametric, 154 songs in the test library). MEqualizer also fits — Nova is just a cleaner musical match.

Pedal_AcousticEmulator.name: AcousticSimulator
Pedal_AcousticEmulator.notes: Bundled acoustic simulator based on the local blue-button acoustic pedal schematic, using Rocksmith's Tone, MidShift, Body, and Mid knobs.

Pedal_DigitalChorus.name: kHs Chorus
Pedal_DigitalChorus.notes: Pair with kHs Filter for the HiFilter/LoFilter controls

Bass_Pedal_BassChorus.name: BassChorus
Bass_Pedal_BassChorus.notes: Bundled Boss CEB-3 model — BBD chorus with the bass Low Filter (keeps lows dry). Rate/Depth/LoFilter/Mix map 1:1 to RS.

Pedal_Flanger.name: MFlanger
Pedal_Flanger.notes: Rate, Depth, Feedback, Dry/Wet — Melda free

Bass_Pedal_BassFlanger.name: BassFlanger
Bass_Pedal_BassFlanger.notes: Bundled Boss BF-2/BF-3 model adapted for bass — modulated delay + feedback (Filter=resonance), lows kept clean. Rate/Depth/Filter/Mix map 1:1.

Pedal_Phaser.name: MPhaser
Pedal_Phaser.notes: Rate, Depth, Feedback, Stages, Dry/Wet — Melda free

Bass_Pedal_BassPhase.name: BassPhase
Bass_Pedal_BassPhase.notes: Bundled analog bass phaser — 4 swept all-pass stages with regeneration, dry/wet notch blend, and a wet-path high-pass so bass lows stay solid. Maps RS Rate/Depth/Mix/Filter.

Pedal_Tremolo.name: MTremolo
Pedal_Tremolo.notes: Rate, Depth, Dry/Wet — Melda free, multi-shape

Pedal_AmpTrem.name: MTremolo
Pedal_AmpTrem.notes: Sine shape = vintage Fender amp tremolo

Pedal_AmpVibe.name: MVibrato
Pedal_AmpVibe.notes: Rate, Depth, Dry/Wet — true vibrato (pitch-mod) not trem

Pedal_BakedRotatoe.name: kHs Chorus
Pedal_BakedRotatoe.notes: Rotary speaker → wide stereo chorus approximation

Pedal_OmniMod.name: kHs Chorus
Pedal_OmniMod.notes: Generic modulation; chorus covers most use cases

Pedal_ValveEcho.name: kHs Delay
Pedal_ValveEcho.notes: Pair with kHs Distortion for tube-style decay

Pedal_OilCanEcho.name: kHs Delay
Pedal_OilCanEcho.notes: Short time + high feedback for oil-can wobble

Pedal_CosmicEcho.name: kHs Delay
Pedal_CosmicEcho.notes: Long times, high feedback for ambient

Pedal_ModDelay.name: ModDelay
Pedal_ModDelay.notes: Bundled DLL10/DML10-style modulated delay using Rocksmith's Time, Feedback, Mix, Rate, and Depth knobs.

Pedal_ModDelay.name: kHs Delay
Pedal_ModDelay.notes: Use chorus after delay for modulation. KHS Delay alone doesn't modulate

Pedal_SpringReverb.name: SpringReverb
Pedal_SpringReverb.notes: Bundled Holy Grail-style spring tank reverb using Rocksmith's Time, Mix, and Depth knobs.

Pedal_SpringReverb.name: kHs Reverb
Pedal_SpringReverb.notes: Size, Damping, Predelay, Dry/Wet — small size + high damping = spring vibe

Pedal_TubeSpring.name: kHs Reverb
Pedal_TubeSpring.notes: Small size + add kHs Distortion for the tube saturation

Pedal_Compression.name: DynamicsCompression
Pedal_Compression.notes: Bundled Dyna Comp-style pedal compressor using Rocksmith's Comp, Attack, and Release knobs.

Pedal_Compression.name: MCompressor
Pedal_Compression.notes: Threshold, Ratio, Attack, Release, Knee, Output Gain, Dry/Wet — Melda free

Bass_Pedal_MBComp.name: BassMultiComp
Bass_Pedal_MBComp.notes: Bundled EBS MultiComp-style multiband bass compressor based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's Compress, Filter, and Rate knobs.

Bass_Pedal_MBComp.name: kHs Compressor
Bass_Pedal_MBComp.notes: Fallback: single-band compressor, loses the multiband Filter behavior.

Bass_Pedal_MBComp.name: MCompressor
Bass_Pedal_MBComp.notes: Single-band fallback — Melda free MDynamicsMB doesn't exist in the free bundle; true multiband needs paid MDynamicsMB

Pedal_EQ5.name: EQ5
Pedal_EQ5.notes: Bundled 5-band graphic EQ, Mesa Boogie 5-band model, RS bands

Pedal_EQ5.name: MEqualizer
Pedal_EQ5.notes: 6-band parametric (Melda free). Fits all 5 RS bands losslessly — curator sets Band 1-5 Frequency to RS freqs (63/250/750/2200/5700 Hz)

Pedal_EQ8.name: EQ8
Pedal_EQ8.notes: Bundled 8-band graphic EQ clone of Rocksmith EQ8

Pedal_EQ8.name: MEqualizer
Pedal_EQ8.notes: 6-band parametric — fits 6 of 8 RS bands (loses 2). Better than kHs 3-Band. Install Marvel GEQ if you want all 8.

Pedal_AmpEQ.name: Amp EQ
Pedal_AmpEQ.notes: Bundled Fender '59 Bassman 5F6-A passive FMV tone stack (Yeh & Smith DAFx-06 model). Bass/Mid/Treble interact with the real mid scoop; BassFreq/MidShift/TrebleFreq scale the tone-stack caps.

Pedal_AmpEQ.name: MEqualizer
Pedal_AmpEQ.notes: 3 bands suffice for Bass/Mid/Treble tone stack — use Band 1-3

Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.name: Bass EQ8
Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.notes: Bundled 8-band bass graphic EQ, Boss GE-7B gyrator model, RS bands

Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.name: MEqualizer
Bass_Pedal_BassEQ8.notes: 6 of 8 RS bands; curator sets Band 1-6 Frequency to RS freqs (e.g. 75/185/460/1100/2700/6800 Hz)

Rack_StudioCompressor.name: Studio Comp
Rack_StudioCompressor.notes: Bundled dbx 160 model — true-RMS feed-forward VCA compressor (dbx 202 RMS detector + log VCA, OverEasy soft knee). Threshold/Ratio/Attack/Release map 1:1 to RS.

Rack_StudioCompressor.name: MCompressor
Rack_StudioCompressor.notes: Threshold (dB direct), Ratio, Attack (ms), Release (ms) — RS values match MCompressor units 1:1. 40 songs use this rack.

Rack_StudioEQ.name: MEqualizer
Rack_StudioEQ.notes: 6-band parametric — fits all 4 RS bands with Q + Freq from MEqualizer's own Band N Q / Band N Frequency knobs. Most-used EQ (154 songs).

Rack_StudioEQ.name: TDR Nova
Rack_StudioEQ.notes: 4-band parametric (dynamic) — direct 1:1 fit if you prefer Nova's musical voicing

Rack_StudioGraphicEQ.name: Studio Graphic EQ
Rack_StudioGraphicEQ.notes: Bundled 5-band sweepable EQ, API-550 proportional-Q style

Pedal_NoiseGate.name: kHs Gate
Pedal_NoiseGate.notes: Threshold, Attack, Release, Hold, Range — dedicated gate module

Pedal_USWah.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_USWah.notes: Cutoff + Resonance; envelope follower in kHs Resonator if needed

Pedal_ModernWah.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_ModernWah.notes: Resonant LPF behaves as a wah

Pedal_LoFiFilter.name: LoFiFilter
Pedal_LoFiFilter.notes: Bundled Lofinator-style lo-fi filter based on the local schematic, using Rocksmith's FilterType and Mix knobs.

Pedal_LoFiFilter.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_LoFiFilter.notes: Pair with kHs Bitcrush for proper lo-fi

Pedal_BobFilter.name: BobFilter
Pedal_BobFilter.notes: Bundled Moog/MuRF-style analog filter based on the local MF-105 schematic, using Rocksmith's Sens, Attack, Release, Mix, and Filter knobs.

Pedal_BobFilter.name: kHs Filter
Pedal_BobFilter.notes: Fallback single-filter sweep if the bundled BobFilter is unavailable

Pedal_AutoFilter.name: AutoSweep
Pedal_AutoFilter.notes: Bundled envelope filter / auto-wah (ships in vst/AutoSweep.vst3). Real envelope follower -> biquad sweep, no separate install.

Bass_Pedal_BassAutoFilter.name: AutoSweep
Bass_Pedal_BassAutoFilter.notes: Bundled Q-Tron-style envelope filter (moved here from Auto Tone; the guitar Auto Tone now uses the colleague's Mu-Tron III clone).

Pedal_GermaniumDrive.name: GermaniumDrive
Pedal_GermaniumDrive.notes: Bundled two-knob smooth germanium overdrive for Rocksmith's Gain/Tone pedal.

Pedal_GermaniumDrive.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_GermaniumDrive.notes: Fallback: Drive + Bias + Type when bundled GermaniumDrive is unavailable.

Pedal_CustomDrive.name: CustomDrive
Pedal_CustomDrive.notes: Bundled MOSFET/diode custom overdrive based on the local Custom Drive schematic, using Rocksmith's Gain, Tone, and Voice knobs.

Pedal_CustomDrive.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_CustomDrive.notes: Fallback: tweak Drive + Type when bundled CustomDrive is unavailable.

Pedal_LineDrive.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_LineDrive.notes: Low drive + clean type for clean boost

Pedal_RangeBooster.name: RangeBooster
Pedal_RangeBooster.notes: Bundled Rangemaster-style treble booster based on the local OC44 Range Booster schematic, using Rocksmith's Boost knob.

Pedal_RangeBooster.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_RangeBooster.notes: Fallback: Drive at minimum plus high-pass EQ for a treble boost approximation.

Pedal_VintageDistortion.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_VintageDistortion.notes: Tube or Diode type for vintage character

Pedal_MetalDistortion.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_MetalDistortion.notes: Hard type + max drive; pair with kHs 3-Band EQ for metal scoop

Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.name: BassDistortion
Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.notes: Bundled Pro Co RAT model — LM308 high-gain + hard silicon clip + the RAT passive Filter low-pass. Gain(Distortion)/Tone(pre-clip)/Filter(RAT Filter) map 1:1 to RS.

Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.name: kHs Distortion
Bass_Pedal_BassDistortion.notes: Use Mix knob to blend dry bass back in

Bass_Pedal_BassOverdrive.name: BassOverdrive
Bass_Pedal_BassOverdrive.notes: Bundled Darkglass Microtubes B3K model — clean+CMOS-clip parallel paths. Blend/Gain(Drive)/Filter(Grunt)/Tone(Attack) map 1:1 to RS.

Pedal_FuzzWasHe.name: FuzzWasHe
Pedal_FuzzWasHe.notes: Bundled two-knob silicon FZ-3 style fuzz based on the local Fuzz Was He schematic.

Pedal_FuzzWasHe.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_FuzzWasHe.notes: Fallback: generic fuzz character when bundled FuzzWasHe is unavailable.

Pedal_CaptFuzzle.name: CaptainFuzzle
Pedal_CaptFuzzle.notes: Bundled two-knob low-headroom germanium fuzz based on the local Captain Fuzzle schematic.

Pedal_CaptFuzzle.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_CaptFuzzle.notes: Fallback: generic fuzz character when bundled CaptainFuzzle is unavailable.

Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.name: BassFuzz
Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.notes: Bundled EHX Bass Big Muff Pi model — 2-stage diode-clip fuzz + Big Muff tone stack + clean low-end blend. Gain/Tone/Filter map 1:1 to RS.

Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.name: kHs Distortion
Bass_Pedal_BassFuzz.notes: Fuzz Face module with Mix to blend dry

Pedal_OctaveUp.name: OctaveUp
Pedal_OctaveUp.notes: Bundled analog octave-up based on a Foxrox Octron-style rectifier path, using Rocksmith's Tone and Mix knobs.

Pedal_OctaveUp.name: kHs Pitch Shifter
Pedal_OctaveUp.notes: Fallback: digital +12 semitone pitch shift and Mix.

Bass_Pedal_BassSubOctave.name: BassSubOctave
Bass_Pedal_BassSubOctave.notes: Bundled Boss OC-2 model — monophonic analog octaver: comparator + flip-flop frequency divider (one octave down), envelope-tracked, with a Tone low-pass and dry/sub Mix. Maps RS Mix/Tone.

Pedal_RingMod.name: MRingModulator
Pedal_RingMod.notes: Frequency, Depth, Dry/Wet — Melda free (yes, the free bundle ships this; *MB variant is the paid one)

Pedal_Enbiggenator.name: kHs Distortion
Pedal_Enbiggenator.notes: Low drive + soft type for 'embiggen' saturation

Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.name: EdenWTDI
Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.notes: Bundled Eden WTDI model — preamp Gain drive + optical Compressor + 3-band active EQ (Bass/Mid/Treble ±15 dB) + Eden Enhance contour. The two red switches are LoShift (Bass Boost) and MidShift, modeled as toggles. Maps all 8 RS knobs.

Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.name: kHs Distortion
Bass_Pedal_EdenWTDI.notes: Low drive + clean type for DI saturation

Rack_StereoAnalogVibe.name: kHs Chorus
Rack_StereoAnalogVibe.notes: Stereo analog vibrato — kHs Chorus's modulated delay covers the wobble character

Rack_StudioChamber.name: kHs Reverb
Rack_StudioChamber.notes: Chamber-style reverb mapped to generic kHs Reverb

Rack_StudioChorus.name: kHs Chorus
Rack_StudioChorus.notes: Multi-knob studio chorus → kHs Chorus (LoFilter/HiFilter dropped, Delay→Delay, Stereo→Stereo)

Rack_StudioDelay.name: kHs Delay
Rack_StudioDelay.notes: Studio stereo delay → kHs Delay. RS TimeL/TimeR averaged into Time.

Rack_StudioFlanger.name: kHs Flanger
Rack_StudioFlanger.notes: Studio flanger → kHs Flanger (Regen→Feedback, Tone dropped)

Rack_StudioPlate.name: kHs Reverb
Rack_StudioPlate.notes: Plate reverb mapped to kHs Reverb (no dedicated plate algo in free)

Rack_TapeEcho.name: kHs Delay
Rack_TapeEcho.notes: Tape echo → kHs Delay (no dedicated tape-saturation in free; the comp pre-stage covers some)
